## 🧪 Test Plan
<!-- How this was verified. Check what applies, add commands/output where useful. -->

- [ ] `bun run test -- --run` (frontend)
- [ ] `cargo test` (src-tauri, if Rust changed)
- [ ] Manually verified in the app (describe what you did)
